{{CargoRelic
|name=Hachiko Statue
|class_id=22170
|rank=A
|affct=CIV
|birthday=09-06
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.55%), Wishing (0.15%)
|description=On Sept 6, 1934 AD, the statue of loyal Hachiko was officially erected at the train station to commemorate him.<br>This statue was erected to commemorate the loyal dog, Hachiko. His owner died of a heart attack at work, but Hachiko still awaited his return in front of the train station. After 9 years of waiting, in 1932, the Hachiko's story was published by a newspaper, and soon the story spread throughout Japan. Touched by the dog's loyalty. Eventually, people erected a statue of Hachiko in front of the station to commemorate him.
|fame=43
|art=41
|fth=34
|civ=63
|tech=32
|ss1=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +200<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +20
|ss2=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +400<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +40
|ss3=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +600<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +60
|ss4=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +1000<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +100
|ss5=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +1400<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +140
|ss7=Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +1400<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail ATK +140<br>Share for the 1st time, Snail HP +1400 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hamster skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion DEF +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, HP Regen +300
}}
